headline: A Look At Genuine Parts (GPC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance puts Genuine Parts in focus Genuine Parts (GPC) has moved onto many investors’ watchlists after the stock fell about 6% over the past month and roughly 33% over the past 3 months, sharpening attention on its valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Genuine Parts. At a share price of $100.74, Genuine Parts has seen its recent weakness build on a downtrend, with the share price down 6.3% over the past month and 32.5% over the past quarter. The 1 year total...
